hero.title: Start with static prototypes, scale into route evaluation.
hero.description: Use the same compiler and evaluator loop for one screen or representative routes.
hero.signal: Plan signal visible in the first viewport.

plans.title: Plans
plans.description: Representative pricing content for eval coverage.

items.name: Team
items.description: For regression corpuses and AI review hooks.

items.question: Does generated output require Node?
items.answer: No. The compiler uses Node, but generated prototypes are static files.

items.question: Can agents add primitives?
items.answer: Yes. Extensions must include manifests, templates, styles, docs, demos, and eval fixtures.
